coreResponsibility.summary: A PlayKit JS plugin that displays configurable pre-roll and/or post-roll bumper video clips before or after main video content playback.

featureOwnership: Bumper video URL or entry-based loading
Click-through URL support for bumper ads
Bumper state machine management (idle, loading, loaded, playing, paused, done)
Bumper-as-ad integration (dispatches ad-related events like AD_BREAK_START, AD_STARTED, AD_COMPLETED)
Main video tag playback mode for iOS/TV compatibility
Metadata-based bumper configuration from Kaltura entries
Content source switching when bumper plays on main video tag
dataHandling: BumperState: Plugin state machine (IDLE, LOADING, LOADED, PLAYING, PAUSED, DONE)
Bumper video element and container DOM management
Content playback state preservation (currentTime, duration, audio/text tracks, playbackRate)
KalturaMetadata: Bumper configuration from entry metadata (BumperUrl, BumperEntryId, BumperPosition, BumperClickThroughUrl)
KalturaFlavorAsset: Video flavor/quality selection for entry-based bumpers

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Parent player that loads and manages this plugin

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js
upstream.description: Core player engine providing BasePlugin, middleware, and event system

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js-providers/ovp-provider
upstream.description: OVP provider for Kaltura API requests (metadata, flavor assets)

downstream.name: Kaltura Player UI
downstream.description: Receives ad events (AD_BREAK_START, AD_STARTED, etc.) to display ad UI

downstream.name: Analytics plugins
downstream.description: Consume ad events for tracking bumper playback

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura OVP API - metadata_metadata.list
externalAPIs.description: Fetches bumper configuration from entry metadata

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura OVP API - flavorasset.list
externalAPIs.description: Lists available video flavors for bumper entry

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura OVP API - flavorasset.getUrl
externalAPIs.description: Gets playback URL for selected bumper flavor

errorPatterns: Get metadata from entry is failed
Failed to load bumper from entryId
